title: Voice Coaching Session
emptyTranscript: Start speaking to begin the conversation. Your transcript will appear here.
emptyTranscriptText: Type a message to begin the conversation.
notConfigured: Voice mode is not available. Contact your admin to configure Azure Voice Live API.
avatarNotConfigured: Avatar mode is not available. Voice-only mode will be used instead.

error.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to voice service. Check your network and try again.
error.micDenied: Microphone access was denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser settings.
error.avatarFailed: Avatar connection failed. Switching to voice-only mode.
error.regionUnsupported: Voice Live API is not available in the configured region. Supported regions: East US 2, Sweden Central.
error.audioWorkletFailed: Audio system initialization failed. Please refresh the page.
error.webrtcFailed: Video connection failed. Switching to voice-only mode.

endSessionConfirm: Are you sure you want to end this voice coaching session? Your conversation will be scored and cannot be resumed.
